name: YAOC2 Policy Gateway
description: Central policy engine. Receives ProposedAction objects from the brain, validates them, evaluates policies, optionally requests human approval, dispatches to sandbox workflows, and returns a result to the brain.

nodes.name: Webhook (ProposedAction Entry)
nodes.notes: Receives POST requests from the brain. Path: /proposed-action. Validate Authorization header against GATEWAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

nodes.name: Validate Schema (Code)
nodes.notes: Check required fields: id, requester, intent, action.type, action.name, action.target_system, action.mode, risk.level, policy.policy_set. Strip unknown fields. Set item.valid = true/false and item.errors[].

nodes.name: Route Valid/Invalid (Switch)
nodes.notes: If item.valid === false → reject path. Else → policy lookup.

nodes.name: Load Policies (Postgres)
nodes.notes: SELECT rules FROM policy_sets WHERE name = {{ $json.policy.policy_set }} ORDER BY priority ASC. Store in item.policy_rules.

nodes.name: Evaluate Policy (Code)
nodes.notes: Iterate item.policy_rules. Match on target_system, action_name, mode, min_risk_level, channel, tenant. First match wins. Output item.decision = 'allow' | 'deny' | 'needs-approval'. If no match, apply defaults from policy set.

nodes.name: Route Decision (Switch)
nodes.notes: Branch on item.decision: allow → dispatcher. deny → reject. needs-approval → approval loop.

nodes.name: Deny Action (Respond to Webhook)
nodes.notes: Return 403 with denial reason. Log to audit table.

nodes.name: Notify Approver (Telegram)
nodes.notes: Send message to APPROVAL_CHAT_ID with action summary, risk level, and Approve/Reject inline keyboard buttons. Include proposed_action_id in callback data.

nodes.name: Wait for Approval (Webhook)
nodes.notes: Separate webhook path: /approval-callback. Receives Telegram callback query with proposed_action_id and decision (approve/reject). Timeout after configurable period → auto-deny.

nodes.name: Record Approval Decision (Postgres)
nodes.notes: INSERT INTO audit_log (proposed_action_id, decision, approver_id, approved_at) VALUES (...). Update item.decision based on approver choice.

nodes.name: Map to Sandbox Workflow (Code)
nodes.notes: Lookup table: action.name → sandbox workflow ID. E.g. ioc_enrichment_misp_opencti → 'yaoc2-sandbox-misp-enrich'. Attach sandbox_workflow_id to item.

nodes.name: Execute Sandbox Workflow
nodes.notes: Call the resolved sandbox workflow with sanitised action.parameters only (no raw user text, no full ProposedAction). Capture result.

nodes.name: Normalise Response (Code)
nodes.notes: Build standard response: { proposed_action_id, final_status, result_summary, raw_result_ref }. Log to audit table.
